vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fixes a potential out-of-bounds (OOB) memory access in the gather_and_maybe_dequant_cache CUDA kernel, as originally reported in Issue #27909.
The bug was identified by static analysis. The root cause was that the offset (calculated from seq_starts[bid] / block_size) was not validate

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix Llama4 Pipeline Parallelism Assert Error
vllm.author: River12
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary: When enabling PP for Llama4 model, each rank has a few PPMissingLayer(). The line assert isinstance(layer, Llama4DecoderLayer) raises assert error when encountering PPMissingLayer(). This PR fixed this bug by using if condition to check the layer is Llama4DecoderLayer.
Test Plan:
In OSS env

vllm.title: [Misc] don't cache `CUTLASS_REVISION` var in CMakeLists.txt
vllm.author: jinzhen-lin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In the CMakeLists.txt, the CUTLASS_REVISION variable is defined with the CACHE property.
If the version value is later modified but the cache isn’t updated, CUTLASS_REVISION will still hold the old value, which can lead to compilation errors.

vllm.author: cjackal

There is no API changes on xgrammar side from this bugfix version update, so safe to bump the version.

vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR removes the @pytest.mark.skip_global_cleanup decorators for the tests that use the GPU.  The decorator was created for tests that do not need GPU cleanup in order to improve CI performance.  However, these tests do use the GPU and when one of the tests in this file fails, this causes the GPU

vllm.title: [Feature] Shared Experts Overlap with FI deepgemm swap kernel, 2.2% throughput improvement and 3.6% TTFT improvement
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix #27134 (comment), thanks for the context from @robertgshaw2-redhat !
Now it is overlapped, we get 2.2% throughput improvement and 3.6% TTFT improvement for BS 32
For bs 256, we get less improvement but still faster than no overlap.

vllm.title: [Core] Add audio_embeds support to chat completions
vllm.author: jeremyteboul
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add ChatCompletionContentPartAudioEmbedsParam to enable audio embedding inputs in chat completions, following the same pattern as image_embeds.
This enables audio models like Qwen3-Omni and future speech models to receive pre-computed audio embeddings/tensors directly, bypassing the need for URL-bas
